## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Keep it focused. -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123. If there's no issue, briefly motivate the change. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR targets **`dev`** (not `main`) — see [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] `corepack pnpm verify` passes locally (build + test + lint + format).
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change.
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md` / `website/docs/` / command `--help`) if behavior changed.
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) — the
      changelog is generated from them.
- [ ] No real secrets, tokens, or a `claude-profile.json` captured from a real machine
      are included anywhere in the diff.
